## Checklist

- [ ] It works — I ran it, not just the tests
- [ ] Tests added/updated and they fail without this change
- [ ] `pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test` green locally
- [ ] No new dependencies — or they're justified below
- [ ] Docs updated (if user-facing)
- [ ] Changeset added via `pnpm changeset` (if user-facing)
- [ ] Commits are signed off (`git commit -s`, DCO)
